Five Nights at Freddy’s (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $137,275,620Details
International Box Office $159,966,525
Worldwide Box Office $297,242,145
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,206,909
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,344,527
Total $8,551,436
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The film follows a troubled security guard as he begins working at Freddy Fazbear’s Pizza. While spending his first night on the job, he realizes the night shift at Freddy’s won’t be so easy to make it through.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$80,001,720 (58.3% of total gross)
Legs:1.72 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 14.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,675 opening theaters/3,789 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $150,074,630

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 27th, 2023 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: October 25th, 2023 (Wide) (Indonesia)
October 25th, 2023 (Wide) (Austria)
October 25th, 2023 (Wide) (Egypt)
October 26th, 2023 (Wide) (Georgia)
October 26th, 2023 (Wide) (Colombia)
Video Release: October 27th, 2023 by Peacock
MPA Rating: PG-13 for strong violent content, bloody images and language.
(Rating bulletin 2793 (cert #54564), 7/26/2023)
Running Time: 109 minutes
Franchise: Five Nights at Freddy’s
Filming location (city or town): New Orleans, LA
Filming location (country): United States
Plot point: Living Toys
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blumhouse
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
